debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
h : @Graph.IsMaxMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · apply csSup_le
    intro n hn
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hn
    exact h.max M' hM'
  · apply le_csSup
    · exact ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩
    · exact Set.nonempty_of_mem ⟨M, h.toIsMatching, rfl⟩

apply le_antisymm
  · exact h.max _ h.toIsMatching
  · apply csSup_le
    intro n hn
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hn
    exact hM'.max _ h.toIsMatching

apply le_antisymm
